name: OpenClaw
description: Managed OpenClaw install and lifecycle manifest for MemphisOS downstream integrations.

commands.name: npm
commands.detail: required for the official npm-based OpenClaw install path

commands.name: git
commands.detail: required for source-based fallback installs and repo workflows

commands.name: pnpm
commands.detail: optional for source builds and local development workflows

install.summary: Install OpenClaw, run non-interactive onboarding, and install the Gateway service.
steps: openclaw onboard --non-interactive --mode local --auth-choice skip --gateway-auth token --gateway-token-ref-env OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN --install-daemon --accept-risk

doctor.summary: Run the upstream OpenClaw environment checks.

start.summary: Start the OpenClaw Gateway managed service.

stop.summary: Stop the OpenClaw Gateway managed service.

restart.summary: Restart the OpenClaw Gateway managed service.

dashboard.summary: Open or print the OpenClaw dashboard endpoint.

notes: This integration pack is intentionally downstream from MemphisOS core.
Keep vendor-specific onboarding, secrets, and service behavior here rather than in MemphisOS main.
The install action resolves OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN from the Memphis vault by default, with direct env export supported as an override.
